title: crepidium bataanense
intro: Crepidium bataanense, also known as the Bataan crepidium, is a species of orchid native to the Philippines. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory problems. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion or decoction, and is also used in herbal remedies like ointments and poultices.
